name: pobai
description: PoBAI proof-of-concept web assistant scaffold for Path of Building 2 snapshots.

scripts.start: npm run build --workspace apps/pobai-web && node apps/pobai-server/src/index.mjs
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace apps/pobai-server" "npm run dev --workspace apps/pobai-web"
